subcodes.first_line: The Book from the presence of the Self-Subsisting unto a people who understand, wherein floweth the Water of Life from the finger of your Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدی القیوم لقوم یفقهون و فیه کوثر الحیوان الذی جری من اصبع ربکم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
